metodos.codigoOriginal: Do Form SigOpIbo With Thisform, 2, This.Titulo

Private pDtI, pDtF

ldDtInicial	= ThisForm.ParentForm.Container1.get_dt_inicial.Value
ldDtFinal	= ThisForm.ParentForm.Container1.get_dt_final.Value

pDtI = fDtoSQL(ldDtInicial)
pDtF = fDtoSQL(ldDtFinal, '23:59:59')

If (ThisForm.pcEscolha = 'PROCURAR') And Not Empty(ThisForm.Pagina.Dados.cntDados.get_codigo.Value)
	Select csTemporario
	Set Near On
	=Seek(ThisForm.Pagina.Dados.cntDados.get_codigo.Value, 'csTemporario', 'Numps')
	Set Near Off
EndIf

=DoDefault()
* Fim *****************************... [TRUNCADO]

Lparameters pQuery, pForm

With ThisForm
	.ParentForm = pForm

	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		With .poDataMgr
			.AddCursor('SigCdNec', 'cIdChaves', 'csTemporario', '', ThisForm.Pagina.Lista.Grade, pQuery)
			.pfSqlTabela(1).pColuna('Numps',    '', '', 'C¾digo',     70, .t.)
			.pfSqlTabela(1).pColuna('Datas',    '', '', 'Data',       75, .t.)
			.pfSqlTabela(1).pColuna('TotPesos', '', '', 'Peso',       80, .f.)
			.pfSqlTabela(1).pColu... [TRUNCADO]

LParameter Opcao, Ok

If (Type('Opcao') = 'N')
	This.Value = Opcao
EndIf

Ok     = .t.
AltPat = .t.
AltTra = .t.

ThisForm._Dopp = csTemporario.Dopps

This.Parent.Parent.Dados.cntDados.Nom_Operacao.Caption = csTemporario.Dopps

lcEdn = csTemporario.Emps + csTemporario.Dopps + Str(csTemporario.Numps, 10)

ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdNec', 'crSigCdNec', 'EmpDNPs', lcEdn)
Select crSigCdNec

=Seek(ThisForm._Dopp, 'crSigCdOpd', 'Dopps')
ThisForm.Titulo = Proper(Alltrim(crSigCdOpd.TNivels)) +... [TRUNCADO]

Select TmpNens
Go Top
_Posicao = TmpNens.Emps + TmpNens.Dopps + Str(TmpNens.Numps, 10)

=Seek(TmpNens.Dopps, 'crSigCdOpd', 'Dopps')

If Inlist(ThisForm.pcEscolha, 'CONSULTAR', 'PROCURAR')
	ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdNec', 'crSigCdNec', 'EmpDNPs', _Posicao)
	Select crSigCdNec

	If (ThisForm.pcEscolha = 'CONSULTAR') And (crSigCdOpd.Etiqs = 1)
		Do Form SigPdM10 With ThisForm, .t.
	EndIf

	=DoDefault()

	ThisForm.mAtivaPagina1
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************... [TRUNCADO]

Private Op_Escolha
Local lcPosicao, lnCodigo, lcCodDopp

lnCodigo  = TmpNens.Numps
lcCodDopp = Alltrim(TmpNens.Dopps) + TmpNens.Emps

Op_Escolha = ThisForm.pcEscolha

=DoDefault()

If ThisForm.plCancelar
	ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdNec', 'crSigCdNec', 'EmpDNPs', TmpNens.Emps + TmpNens.Dopps + Str(TmpNens.Numps, 10))
	ThisForm.mAtivaPagina1
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************

=DoDefault()

=Seek(ThisForm._Dopp, 'crSigCdOpd', 'Dopps')

If ThisForm.AtFoco
	ThisForm.AtFoco = .f.
	With ThisForm.Pagina.Dados
		Do Case
			Case (ThisForm.pcEscolha = 'PROCURAR')
				.cntDados.get_codigo.SetFocus

			Case Inlist(ThisForm.pcEscolha, 'CONSULTAR', 'EXCLUIR')
				.grupo_salva.salva.SetFocus
		EndCase
	EndWith
EndIf
Select TmpNens
Go Top
* Fim **************************************************************************************

If Inlist(ThisForm.pcEscolha, 'INSERIR', 'ALTERAR') 
	Select TmpOperacao
	Count to _LnCont For Codigos > 0
	If _lnCont > 0
		MessageBox('A Data s¾ pode ser alterada antes de Informar Envelopes/Ops',0+16,'')
		Return .f.
	Else
		Return .t.
	Endif
Else
	Return .f.
Endif

If (fVerificaBloqueio(This.Value, ThisForm.podatamgr) <> 0)
	=Messagebox('Periodo Bloqueado!!!', 0+48, '')
	Return 0
EndIf

If (fBloqueioPorPeriodo(This.Value, ThisForm.podatamgr) <> 0)
	=Messagebox('Periodo Bloqueado!!!', 0+48, '')
	Return 0
EndIf


If (crSigCdOpd.Origems = 1)
	lcQuery = [Select Codigos, Datas ] + ;
			    [From SigCdFcx ] + ;
			   [Where Emps = '] + ThisForm.pEmps + [' And ] + ;
			   		 [Grupos = '] + TmpNens.GrupoOs + [' And ] + ;
			   		 [Contas = '] + TmpNens.ContaOs + [... [TRUNCADO]
Return .f.
Return .f.
Return .f.
Return .f.
Return .f.
Return .f.
Return .f.
Return .f.
Return .f.
Return (ThisForm.pcEscolha <> 'PROCURAR')

If (ThisForm.pcEscolha <> 'PROCURAR')
	ThisForm.Enabled = .f.
	Select xMfas
	Set Order To

	Do Form SigPdMp5 With ThisForm, ThisForm.DataSessionId
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************
Return (ThisForm.pcEscolha <> 'PROCURAR')

If (ThisForm.pcEscolha <> 'PROCURAR')
	ThisForm.Enabled = .f.

	Select xNensi
	Set Order To

	Do Form SigPdMp2 With ThisForm, ThisForm.DataSessionId
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************
Return (ThisForm.pcEscolha <> 'PROCURAR')

If (ThisForm.pcEscolha <> 'PROCURAR')
	ThisForm.Enabled = .f.
	Select xNensi
	Set Order To
	ThisForm.Enabled = .f.

	If (crSigCdPam.AltPesas = 1)
		Select xOpi
		Go Top
		Do Form SigPdMp3 With ThisForm, ThisForm.DataSessionId
	Else
		Select xPesa
		Go Top

		Do Form SigPdMp9 with ThisForm
	EndIf
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************
Do Form SigOpInf With ThisForm, ThisForm.DataSessionId

=Seek(ThisForm._Dopp, 'crSigCdOpd', 'Dopps')

If (crSigCdOpd.Boletos = 1)
	ThisForm.ImpBol()
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************

=Seek(ThisForm._Dopp, 'crSigCdOpd', 'Dopps')

* Impressao Boleto
If (crSigCdOpd.Docus = 1)
	=Seek(TmpNens.Dopps, 'crSigCdOpd', 'Dopps')
	ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdNec', 'crSigCdNec', 'EmpDNPs', TmpNens.Emps + TmpNens.Dopps + Str(TmpNens.Numps, 10))

	Do SigPrIdc With TmpNens.Emps, TmpNens.Dopps, TmpNens.Numps, 0, crSigCdOpd.QtdDocs,.f.,.f.,.f.,.f.,.f.,.f.,ThisForm
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************
Return .f.

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: Select * From GravaNens Where 0=1 Into Cursor TmpNens ReadWrite

Select *, 000000.000 as ps2FaseAnt, Space(3) as cUnips, .f. as OsRets, .f. as Retrabs, Space(10) as MatPrincs,; 	000000.000 as PsFaseAnt, Space(60) as Descs, ; 	0 as Rateio, .f. as Visivel, 000000.000 as QtFaseAnt, 000000 as Amarracao, 00 as TrfPesa, 0 as ServAuto,; 	SPACE(20) as dopcs, 0 as retrab  ; From GravaNensI Where 1=0 Into Cursor xNensi ReadWrite
